meta.title: Ukuhlola Iividiyo - Hlola Iividiyo ze-Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Hlola iividiyo ze-Instagram, YouTube ne-Facebook simahla. Akukho app efunekayo. Kukhawuleza kwaye kulula.

hero.title: Ukuhlola Iividiyo ze-Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Hlola iividiyo ze-Instagram Reels, Facebook ne-YouTube ngoko nangoko. Simahla, kukhawuleza, akukho app efunekayo.

howto.title: Indlela Yokufota Iividiyo
howto.step1_desc: Vula i-Instagram, YouTube okanye Facebook ukopisha isixhobo sevidiyo.
howto.step2_desc: Cofa isixhobo ebhokisini elingasentla uze ucofe inkinobho Yokufota.
howto.step3_desc: Khetha umgangatho ofunekayo ugcine ividiyo kwisixhobo sakho.

result.title: Ividiyo Yakho Ilungile!
result.error: Ayikwazanga ukufumana ividiyo. Nceda uhlole isixhobo uzame kwakhona.
result.invalid_url: Nceda ufake isixhobo esifanelekileyo se-Instagram, TikTok, Facebook okanye YouTube.

faq.title: Imibuzo Ebuzwa Rhoqo
faq.a1: Ewe, simahla ngokupheleleyo. Akukho kubhalisa okanye app efunekayo.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Izithombe, Stories), YouTube (Iividiyo, Shorts), ne-Facebook (Iividiyo, Reels).
faq.a3: Ewe. Asigcini izixhobo okanye iividiyo zakho. Yonke into iyenziwa ngexesha lokwenene.

trending.title: Iividiyo Eziphezulu Kule Veki
trending.subtitle: Cinezela ukubukela ku-YouTube • kopisha isixhobo ukufota

footer.tagline: Ukufota ividiyo ngokukhawuleza nangokumahhala kwiindawo zakho ozithandayo.
footer.disclaimer: Eli xabiso lisetyenziselwa ukusetyenziswa komntu ngamnye kuphela. Nceda uhloniphe imiqathango yamalungelo.
